title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Sara+Eva Sandy Toes duo dance
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Sandy Toes.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Loop choreography is rhythmic kid-pop dance with bucket-and-shovel props.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — designed pastel-beach backdrop. SKY: soft sky-blue to seafoam-green gradient. GROUND: stylized golden-sand floor with cartoon-shape pastel seashells in pinks, corals, and creams scattered around. Tiny pastel seashell confetti and fluffy soft cloud-shapes drift gently down through the frame from above. NO real beach, NO real ocean, NO scene clutter, NO logos, NO real text. @sara-beach already on the LEFT and @eva-beach already on the RIGHT, both standing on the stylized golden-sand floor with both feet planted side-by-side at slight angles to the camera at gentle dance distance from each other. Both girls hold a small yellow plastic bucket and a small red plastic shovel — Sara holds one bucket in her left hand at her side and one small shovel in her right hand, Eva holds one bucket in her right hand at her side and one small shovel in her left hand. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — bucket left, shovel right. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — bucket right, shovel left. Mouths gently open in cheerful sing-along expression. Both girls perform a synchronized loop-clean kid-pop dance: gentle hip-sway to the LEFT, gentle hip-sway to the RIGHT, both lift their bucket-arm out and down softly, both lift their shovel-arm out and down softly, both step gently in place — left foot stomp, right foot stomp — then return to standing facing the camera. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful warm summer afternoon lighting. The two girls hum and sing along generically — generic happy mouth movements, no specific lip-sync to specific words. Designed to LOOP cleanly: both girls return to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. MIRROR-LOCK — Sara's bucket is in her LEFT hand and shovel in her RIGHT hand throughout the entire 10s. Eva's bucket is in her RIGHT hand and shovel in her LEFT hand throughout the entire 10s. Neither girl ever swaps props or has the same hand-arrangement. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — bucket in left, shovel in right. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — bucket in right, shovel in left. NO third hand, NO fourth arm, NO floating hand from either girl. Each girl stays grounded with both feet on the stylized sand floor throughout. The sand floor stays plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
